metadata.description: Custom Claude Code plugins — data exploration, multi-dimensional research, incremental build pipelines, repo auditing, project question tracking, and cross-platform alerts.

plugins.name: schema-scout
plugins.description: CLI tool for exploring the schema and values of any data file (XLSX, CSV, JSON). Auto-detects JSON in cells, repairs double-encoded UTF-8, prunes overflow artifacts.

plugins.name: miltiaze
plugins.description: Multi-dimensional idea exploration and requirements generation — decomposes concepts into research angles, investigates each thoroughly with verified sources, presents multiple solutions with honest tradeoffs. Requirements mode produces architect-ready documents.

plugins.name: ladder-build
plugins.description: Incremental build pipeline — decomposes projects into small verifiable milestones, or executes architect-planned sprints with parallel task execution. Build, test, verify each rung before climbing to the next.

plugins.name: project-structure
plugins.description: Generate and maintain a live annotated project structure map in CLAUDE.md with purpose annotations and quick-lookup tables.

plugins.name: repo-audit
plugins.description: Repo audit and cross-cutting amendment protocol — read-only codebase analysis plus enforced change workflow with snapshot and pattern lookup consultation.

plugins.name: project-note-tracker
plugins.description: Track questions per handler/department. Auto-detects which handler should answer, researches from project context in the background, logs to an Excel tracker, generates meeting agendas. Auto-gitignores itself.

plugins.name: alert-sounds
plugins.description: Cross-platform alerts for Claude Code events — sound, desktop notifications, and status line colors. Fully configurable per event. WSL2 supported.

plugins.name: safe-commit
plugins.description: Commit safety layer — secret scanning, identity verification, and commit hygiene enforcement. Blocks commits containing secrets, sensitive files, hardcoded paths, or merge conflict markers.

plugins.name: mk-flow
plugins.description: Unified workflow system — automatic intent detection, dense input decomposition, per-project state tracking, pipeline-aware routing, session continuity, and seamless mode switching. Connects miltiaze, architect, ladder-build, and note-tracker into a unified flow.

plugins.name: architect
plugins.description: Multi-agent technical leadership — spawns perspective agents to design architecture, produce sprint plans with task specs, run adversarial QA, audit existing codebases, and escalate decisions. The tech lead between research and execution.

plugins.name: mk-cc-all
plugins.description: All mk-cc-resources skills in one install: Schema Scout, Miltiaze, Ladder Build, Architect, Project Structure, Repo Audit, Project Note Tracker, and Safe Commit. mk-flow and Alert Sounds have hooks and must be installed separately.
